queries: ("Breast Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR breast neoplasm*[tiab] OR breast cancer*[tiab] OR mammary carcinoma*[tiab]) AND ("Microbiota"[Mesh] OR "Microbiome"[Mesh] OR microbiot*[tiab] OR microbiom*[tiab] OR bacteriome[tiab] OR bacteri*[tiab]) AND ("Breast Tissue"[Mesh] OR tissue*[tiab] OR tumor[tiab] OR tumour[tiab] OR intratumor*[tiab] OR intra-tumor*[tiab] OR "tumor microenvironment"[tiab] OR biopsy[tiab] OR FFPE[tiab] OR "formalin-fixed"[tiab]) NOT (stool[tiab] OR fecal[tiab] OR faecal[tiab] OR saliva[tiab] OR oral[tiab] OR gut[tiab])

(("Triple Negative Breast Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR TNBC[tiab] OR triple negative[tiab] OR triple-negative[tiab] OR basal-like[tiab] OR (ER-negative[tiab] AND PR-negative[tiab] AND HER2-negative[tiab])) AND (non-triple-negative[tiab] OR nontriple-negative[tiab] OR non-TNBC[tiab] OR "non TNBC"[tiab] OR luminal[tiab] OR "HER2-enriched"[tiab] OR "HER2-positive"[tiab] OR "ER-positive"[tiab] OR subtype*[tiab])) AND ("Microbiota"[Mesh] OR "Microbiome"[Mesh] OR microbiot*[tiab] OR microbiom*[tiab]) AND (tissue*[tiab] OR tumor[tiab] OR tumour[tiab] OR intratumor*[tiab] OR biopsy[tiab]) AND ("alpha-diversity"[tiab] OR "beta-diversity"[tiab] OR "community composition"[tiab] OR "differential abundance"[tiab] OR enrichment[tiab] OR pathway*[tiab] OR "functional profil*"[tiab] OR inflammation[tiab] OR "Cell Proliferation"[Mesh] OR proliferation[tiab] OR invasion[tiab] OR "Neoplasm Metastasis"[Mesh] OR metastasis[tiab] OR Azospirillum[tiab] OR "Gemmiger formicilis"[tiab] OR "Anaerobutyricum soehngenii"[tiab] OR "Eubacterium hallii"[tiab])

(("Triple Negative Breast Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR TNBC[tiab] OR triple negative[tiab] OR triple-negative[tiab]) AND (non-triple-negative[tiab] OR non-TNBC[tiab] OR luminal[tiab] OR "HER2-positive"[tiab] OR "ER-positive"[tiab] OR "PR-positive"[tiab])) AND (breast[tiab] AND (tissue*[tiab] OR tumor[tiab] OR tumour[tiab] OR intratumor*[tiab])) AND ("Microbiota"[Mesh] OR "Microbiome"[Mesh] OR microbiot*[tiab] OR microbiom*[tiab]) AND ("RNA, Ribosomal, 16S"[Mesh] OR "High-Throughput Nucleotide Sequencing"[Mesh] OR "Metagenomics"[Mesh] OR 16S[tiab] OR "16S rRNA"[tiab] OR amplicon[tiab] OR metagenom*[tiab] OR shotgun[tiab] OR sequencing[tiab]) AND ("Case-Control Studies"[Mesh] OR "Cohort Studies"[Mesh] OR "Cross-Sectional Studies"[Mesh] OR cohort[tiab] OR "case-control"[tiab] OR "cross-sectional"[tiab] OR multicenter[tiab] OR "Comparative Study"[Publication Type]) AND Humans[Mesh]

("Breast Neoplasms"[Mesh] AND "Triple Negative Breast Neoplasms"[Mesh]) AND ("Microbiota"[Mesh] OR "Microbiome"[Mesh] OR "Metagenomics"[Mesh]) AND ("Biopsy"[Mesh] OR "Breast/pathology"[Mesh] OR "Neoplasm Microenvironment"[Mesh]) AND Humans[Mesh]

((breast[tiab] OR mammary[tiab]) AND (tumor[tiab] OR tumour[tiab] OR tissue[tiab] OR intratumor*[tiab] OR "tumor microenvironment"[tiab] OR "tumour microenvironment"[tiab])) AND ("intratumoral microbiome"[tiab] OR "intratumoural microbiome"[tiab] OR "tumor-resident microbiota"[tiab] OR "tissue microbiome"[tiab] OR microbiom*[tiab] OR microbiot*[tiab]) AND (TNBC[tiab] OR triple-negative[tiab] OR "triple negative"[tiab] OR basal-like[tiab]) AND (non-TNBC[tiab] OR nontriple-negative[tiab] OR luminal[tiab] OR "HER2-positive"[tiab] OR "ER-positive"[tiab]) AND (diversity[tiab] OR "alpha diversity"[tiab] OR "beta diversity"[tiab] OR "community composition"[tiab] OR "differential abundance"[tiab] OR enrichment[tiab] OR Azospirillum[tiab] OR "Gemmiger formicilis"[tiab] OR "Anaerobutyricum soehngenii"[tiab] OR "Eubacterium hallii"[tiab] OR inflammation[tiab] OR proliferation[tiab] OR invasion[tiab] OR metastasis[tiab] OR pathway*[tiab]) NOT (stool[tiab] OR fecal[tiab] OR faecal[tiab] OR saliva[tiab] OR oral[tiab])

inclusion_criteria: Human breast cancer patients with tumor tissue samples, with clearly defined TNBC and non-TNBC subgroups.
Sequencing-based microbiome profiling performed directly on breast tumor tissue (e.g., 16S rRNA gene amplicon or shotgun metagenomics).

Comparative analysis of microbial community composition between TNBC and non-TNBC, reporting differential taxa and/or enrichment of specific genera/species (e.g., Azospirillum, Gemmiger formicilis, Anaerobutyricum soehngenii).

Observational original studies (e.g., cross-sectional, case-control, or cohort) that report composition differences and/or functional pathway involvement related to inflammation, proliferation, invasion, or metastasis.
exclusion_criteria: Non-human studies or studies not using breast tumor tissue (e.g., stool, blood, saliva, breast milk) for microbiome profiling.
No explicit comparison between TNBC and non-TNBC subtypes or absence of molecular subtype classification.
Non-original reports (reviews, editorials, letters, protocols) or conference abstracts; studies lacking sufficient microbiome composition data for comparison.
Studies focusing exclusively on non-bacterial communities (e.g., virome or mycobiome only) or non-microbiome assays without bacterial composition or functional pathway data.
screening_criteria.description: Screen studies that compare the breast tumor tissue microbiome between TNBC and non-TNBC patients, focusing on bacterial community composition, enrichment of specified taxa, and functional pathways linked to inflammation, proliferation, invasion, and metastasis using sequencing-based methods in human tissue.
